title: report
content: Weaviate BYOV + real sentence-transformers embedder + turbovec compression in context-forge (Phase 0/1 of deep research enhancement). Used by research-memory for RAG and by deep-research hooks for token-efficient prior recall. See index-with-turbovec.py, compress-output.py, and 2026-06-04 plan.
summary: Weaviate BYOV + real sentence-transformers embedder + turbovec compression in context-forge (Phase 0/1 of deep research enhancement).
